case_title: GONNET HENRY et al VS BORIGHT JOSEPHINE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BORIGHT JOSEPHINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GONNET HENRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,426.59 AS TO DEFENDANT BORIGHT JOSEPHINE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
